reviewRound: post-Codex-review-fix round 2 (P1x3 + P2x3, then P1 build_sentence + P2 verifier re-fixed)
mode: draft-only (no promote, no commit, no DeepSeek, no audio)
specSource: ETS official TOEFL iBT Test Blueprint and Specifications Document 2026 (PDF)

keptPackages.answerSemantics: canonical/reference order (NOT sole legal answer; argument PPs can front)

stoppedPackages.detail: ETS Blueprint does not give Reading MCQ option count (only 'selected-response, e.g. multiple choice'). 2/3-item sets confirmed but option count not. Per exec doc 3.4, type stopped.
stoppedPackages.action: 10 draft sets deleted; source moved to data/generated-question-sets/toefl-2026-pilot-blocked/

stoppedPackages.detail: Option count not given; questions-per-passage not given (only items 5-15 per claim). 3-4 per passage was an assumption. Per exec doc 3.4, type stopped.
stoppedPackages.action: 10 draft sets deleted; source moved to blocked/

reviewFixes.P1-1_stop_unverified_reading_types: read_daily_life + academic_reading stopped per exec doc 3.4 (option count / questions-per-passage unconfirmed in ETS Blueprint). 20 draft sets / 67 items / 20 stimuli deleted via scripts/remove-blocked-templates.ts; source preserved in blocked dir + README.
reviewFixes.P1-2_promote_guard: promote-question-sets-v2.ts now hard-rejects qa_flags.scoring_not_ready or official_spec_unverified. Verified: promote --task=build_a_sentence dry-run -> candidates 10, eligible 0, rejected 10 (scoring_not_ready).
reviewFixes.P1-3_build_sentence_answer_semantics: Round-2 re-fix: subcategorized PP complements do NOT prevent fronting (argument PPs can topicalize, e.g. 'On their success, the manager congratulated the team'). Chasing absolute uniqueness by rewriting is not viable. Instead: answer is now defined as canonical/reference order (NOT the sole legal answer); the 'unique order solved 10/10' claim is removed from all reports; shape comment + template promptHintZh/qualityRules + per-set explain_zh reworded to 'canonical/参考语序, 非唯一合法解'. Containment stays scoring_not_ready=true + promote hard-reject. Unlock later via acceptable-permutation-set or confirmed ETS scoring rules.
reviewFixes.P2-4_materialType: Resolved by P1-1: read_daily_life stopped/removed, so the unenforced materialType whitelist no longer applies. (To be enforced if the type is restored after official spec confirmation.)
reviewFixes.P2-5_verifier_deterministic: Round-2 re-fix: previous verifier only compared counts (source-valid == DB-draft), so 10 stale rows + 10 new source rows would pass. Rewritten to replicate the importer's deterministic hashId, derive each source record's legacy_id, and compare 1:1 against DB payload (input_mode / prompt / choices / answer); asserts exactly 1 item per set, complete_words input_mode==='spell', productive free_text+rubric_id+official=false+prompt match, and bidirectional mapping (no DB set outside the source-derived legacy_id set). All 4 packages: 源↔DB 逐条一致 10/10.
reviewFixes.P2-6_word_count_phrasing: Email/Discussion wordLimit reworded to 'Project guidance (not an official TOEFL requirement): ...'. 20 sets deleted + reimported with new wordLimit (wrote 20 / dup 0).

idempotency.objectiveRerun: complete_the_words dup-skip 10; build_a_sentence wrote 10 after targeted delete of old 10
idempotency.productiveRerun: email/discussion wrote 20 after targeted delete of old 20 (wordLimit update)

answerPositionNormalize.note: After stopping the 2 reading MCQ types, the TOEFL pilot has no choice items (complete_the_words=spell, build_a_sentence=multi_blank). Bank choice items dropped 1067->1000; normalize dry-run shows BEFORE==AFTER identical (a228/b258/c263/d251) -> still converged, no re-apply needed.

coverage.note: 4 kept TOEFL non-audio types are THIN (10 each, pilot). 9 MISSING = 7 audio-gated (listening/speaking) + 2 stopped TOEFL reading types (read_daily_life, academic_reading) now back to MISSING pending official spec confirmation.
